title: iter-10 $0 re-analysis: stronger-verifier n=60 rigor fix + 4 MINOR fixes + FORK
layman_summary: A zero-cost re-check of frozen experiment results that fixes an unfair table comparison and hands the paper writer ready-to-paste tables, sentences, and a checklist.
summary: Pure $0 (no LLM, no network; numpy/scipy only) re-analysis extending the iter-9 precedent eval (art_4xy3D05YxvRr). Reads per-query rows + metadata from three frozen sources: S1 iter-8 located-in, S2 iter-8 verifier (CLUTRR + Re-DocRED kinship reproduced from S2's redocred groups — no iter_7 dependency), S3 iter-9 booster. BLOCK 0 reproduction/no-spend gate recomputes every carried literal from rows: 87/87 HARD checks PASS + 5/5 soft MC cross-checks within tol (located-in counts 515/450/250, FACT-A 0.30 sibling / 0.06 diffcomp, caught fractions cert 0.785/verb 0.40/ptrue 0.304/sc_margin 0.067/negent 0.067/verifier 0.274/selfverify 0.459, gold-read ceiling 1.0/1.0/1.0, verifier-necessity cert 0.941/0.850 vs 0.588/0.100 + gaps, frontier slopes -0.3038 located-in / -0.6724 kinship, S0-default reproduces iter-8). RIGOR MAJOR retired: (1a) a SEPARATE n=60 stronger-verifier table on its OWN denominator (deepseek-v3.2 k=5, n_sibling=250/60 fab: cert 0.667 > self-verify-strong 0.533 > weak-same-model 0.20 > strong-x-family 0.10 — stronger x-family is WORSE), carried + two-copy-consistency-checked (located_in.stronger_verifier_block == headline_summary copy) + strict within-subsample ordering asserted; (1b) a CORRECTED tab:locatedin (n=450/135 shared denom, 7 methods each with cert-minus-method doc-clustered caught-gap CI, all 6 exclude 0) from which the stronger-x-family 0.100 is REMOVED and demoted to a footnote; an automated guard asserts 0.10 is absent and no x-family row leaked; same-model verifier kept at two values by denominator (0.274 n450 vs 0.20 n60, never conflated). Both LaTeX bodies + structured dicts emitted. Four MINORs: evidence (four exact paired sentences pairing 0.785 with the extraction-gated / targeting-quality caveat — abstract/intro/contribution-3/conclusion, both-clauses auto-verified), presentation (5-item de-densification checklist + lean <=3-block intro skeleton), scope (single feasibility appendix A.1 ~3000-char case study + A.2 fuzzy note, out-of-scope kept in intro), novelty (labeled PENDING distinguishing-sentence slot vs ontology-grounded post-extraction correction). Significance: abstract FORK_A/FORK_B with selection rule keyed to the parallel precision-preserving-extractor experiment + updated one-thesis contribution table (mechanism INHERITED +0.673/+0.0025). Every derived number tagged (CARRIED-LITERAL / REPRODUCED-FROM-ROWS / RE-ANALYSIS-DERIVED / CARRIED-FROM-BLOCK / PENDING-PARALLEL-EXPERIMENT). Outputs eval.py + eval_out.json (full/mini/preview, exp_eval_sol_out-validated, all <100KB) + eval_digest.md mirroring all blocks with LaTeX bodies for GEN_PAPER_TEXT to lift directly.
